title: Application of Sub-part
doc_html:
PART III.  POLICE DEPARTMENT

SUBPART A.  ORGANIZATION

§2191.  Application of Sub-part

This Sub-part applies to any paid police department operated by a municipality which has a population of fifty thousand or more.
doc_text:
PART III.  POLICE DEPARTMENT
SUBPART A.  ORGANIZATION
§2191.  Application of Sub-part
This Sub-part applies to any paid police department operated by a municipality which has a population of fifty thousand or more.
